description: Attempt to react to a Bitbucket Cloud pull request or issue comment. Bitbucket Cloud currently has no documented REST endpoint for comment emoji/like reactions, so this tool returns an unsupported error rather than calling an invented API.

resource.description: Whether the comment belongs to a pull_request or issue thread.

resource_id.description: Pull request id or issue id that owns the comment.

comment_id.description: Comment id from the comment object returned by the read or create comment APIs.

reaction.description: Requested reaction key, e.g. thumbs_up, heart, smile. Bitbucket Cloud does not document support for applying it.
